description: Reports the status of the specified car component or performance metric.
Gives a good/bad type response for the specified temperatures.
Gives the actual temperatures.
Gives the actual temperatures.
Reports the specified race information.
Reports the fastest lap in the session for the player's car class.
Switches off messages.
Switches messages back on.
Reports the remaining time or laps in the session.
Switches the spotter on and off. Note: even in 'leave me alone' mode the spotter still operates unless explicitly switched off.

phrases: do i still have a penalty
description: Reports the penalty status.

phrases: do i have a mandatory pit stop
do i have a mandatory stop
do i have to make a pit stop
description: Reports if a pit stop is required.
Reports the position of the specified opponent driver.

phrases: what's [opponent driver last name]'s last lap
description: Reports the last lap time of the specified opponent driver.

phrases: what's [opponent driver last name]'s best lap
description: Reports the best lap time of the specified opponent driver.
Reports the iRating of the specified opponent driver (iRacing).

phrases: what's [opponent driver last name]'s license class
description: Reports the license class of the specified opponent driver (iRacing).
Reports the last lap time of the opponent in the specified race position (e.g., 'what's p 4's last lap').
Reports the best lap time of the opponent in the specified race position.
Reports the iRating of the opponent in the specified race position (iRacing).
Reports the license class of the opponent in the specified race position (iRacing).

phrases: what's the car in front's last lap
what's the guy in front's last lap
what's the car ahead's last lap
what's the guy ahead's last lap
description: Reports the last lap time of the car ahead.

phrases: what's the car in front's best lap
what's the guy in front's best lap
what's the car ahead's best lap
what's the guy ahead's best lap
description: Reports the best lap time of the car ahead.

phrases: what's the car in front's irating
what's the guy in front's irating
description: Reports the iRating of the car ahead (iRacing).

phrases: what's the car in front's license class
what's the guy in front's license class
what's the car ahead's license class
what's the guy ahead's license class
description: Reports the license class of the car ahead (iRacing).

phrases: what's the car behind's last lap
what's the guy behind's last lap
description: Reports the last lap time of the car behind.

phrases: what's the car behind's best lap
what's the guy behind's best lap
description: Reports the best lap time of the car behind.
Reports the iRating of the car behind (iRacing).

phrases: what's the car behind's license class
what's the guy behind's license class
description: Reports the license class of the car behind (iRacing).

phrases: what tyre is [opponent driver last name] on
what tyres is [opponent driver last name] on
what tyre is [opponent race position] on
what tyres is [opponent race position] on
description: Reports the tyre compound the specified opponent is using.
Reports the player's sector times.
Reports the player's last sector time.
Reports the current leader. Only works if driver name recording for the lead car is available.

phrases: who's in front in the race
description: Reports the name of the car ahead/behind in the race or on the timing sheet for qualifying/practice. Only works if driver name recording for that driver is available.
Reports the name of the car ahead/behind on track, regardless of race/qualifying position. Only works if driver name recording for that driver is available.
Switches on 'deltas' mode where the time gaps in front and behind get read out on each lap. These messages play even if messages are disabled.
Switches off deltas mode.
Replays the last message.
Reports the actual brake or tyre temperatures.
Reports the current real-world time.
Reports the per-lap or per-minute average fuel consumption.

phrases: what tyre type am i on
description: Reports the tyre name currently being used, if available.

phrases: how much fuel do i need for [X] minutes
how much fuel do i need for [X] laps
description: Estimates how much fuel will likely be needed for the specified number of minutes or laps.
RaceRoom only. Gives lap time deltas for the best lap on each tyre type used during the session, across all drivers in the same car class as the player.
Enables manual rolling-start mode (used by some online leagues).
Disables manual rolling-start mode.
If Crew Chief has enough data, reports the corner name where the player is gaining the most time on the car in front.
If Crew Chief has enough data, reports the corner name where the player is losing the most time to the car behind.
Reads out each corner name when the player hits the mid-point of the corner, for this lap only (useful for testing corner name mappings).
Reports any damage the car has sustained.
Reports any damage the car has sustained, tyre and brake temperature status, and fuel/battery status.
Reports race position, gaps, and time/laps left in the session.
Combines damage report, car status, and session status (very verbose).

phrases: how much fuel to the end
how much fuel do we need
description: Reports how many litres or gallons of fuel Crew Chief thinks will be needed to finish the race.

phrases: is the car ahead in my class
is the car ahead my class
is the car ahead the same class as me
is the car in front in my class
is the car in front my class
is the car in front the same class as me
description: Responds yes or no.

phrases: is the car behind in my class
is the car behind my class
is the car behind the same class as me
description: Responds yes or no.

phrases: what class is the car ahead
what class is the guy ahead
what class is the car in front
what class is the guy in front
description: Reports the class name, or 'faster'/'slower' if Crew Chief doesn't have the class name.

phrases: what class is the car behind
what class is the guy behind
description: Reports the class name, or 'faster'/'slower' if Crew Chief doesn't have the class name.
Times the next pitstop (sector 3 + sector 1 time) to work out how much time overall a pitstop costs. Practice session only.

phrases: where will i be after a stop?
what will happen if i pit?
description: Plays an estimate of traffic and race positions on pit exit if the player were to pit on this lap.

phrases: don't talk in the braking zones
no messages in the braking zones
description: Delays non-critical messages if the player is in a challenging section of the track.
Disables message delay in challenging parts of the track.
Sets the alarm clock at the given time. Supports both 12- and 24-hour format and multiple alarms.
Clears all alarms set.
Warns about track cuts.
Stops cut track warnings.
Adds this driver to a list of drivers Crew Chief will keep the player informed about.
Adds this driver to a list of drivers Crew Chief will keep the player informed about.
Adds this driver to a list of drivers Crew Chief will keep the player informed about.
Clears all monitored drivers.
Removes the specified driver from the monitored list.

Enables tearoff for the next pitstop (iRacing).
Enables fast repair for the next pitstop (iRacing).
Clears all selected pitstop options (iRacing).
Clears all tyre selections for the next pitstop (iRacing).
Clears tearoff selection for the next pitstop (iRacing).
Clears fast repair selection for the next pitstop (iRacing).
Clears fuel refuelling for the next pitstop (iRacing).
Changes all tyres at the next pitstop (iRacing).

Changes the right front tyre at the next pitstop (iRacing).
Changes the left rear tyre at the next pitstop (iRacing).
Changes the right rear tyre at the next pitstop (iRacing).
Changes the left side tyres at the next pitstop (iRacing).
Changes the right side tyres at the next pitstop (iRacing).
Changes all tyre pressures to the specified value at the next pitstop (iRacing).

description: Changes the left front tyre pressure to the specified value at the next pitstop (iRacing).

phrases: pitstop change right front tyre pressure [new value]
description: Changes the right front tyre pressure to the specified value at the next pitstop (iRacing).

phrases: pitstop change left rear tyre pressure [new value]
description: Changes the left rear tyre pressure to the specified value at the next pitstop (iRacing).

phrases: pitstop change right rear tyre pressure [new value]

phrases: pitstop fuel to the end of the race
description: Adds the fuel amount Crew Chief calculates will be needed to finish the race (iRacing).

description: Reports the Strength of Field (iRacing).

description: Reports the player's incident count (iRacing).
Reports the incident limit (iRacing).
RaceRoom only. Clears all tyre selections for the next pitstop.

RaceRoom only. Changes only the rear tyres at the next pitstop.

RaceRoom only. Does not fix suspension at the next pitstop.

RaceRoom only. Does not serve a penalty at the next pitstop.

RaceRoom only. Does not refuel at the next pitstop.
